display.name: Whispering Barricade
display.short_description: A fallen barricade is packed with torn travel sacks and damp ledgers. Wind through the bottle-neck gaps makes the whole thing murmur.

choices.label: Dig out the ration wax
choices.summary: Scrape the waxed crumbs from an old field ration and eat on the move.

choices.label: Follow the names
choices.summary: Read the ruined ledger until the route patterns click into place in your head.
